name: Caught Mid Firework Show - Yuzuha & Alice
description:
"It's almost midnight already! I don't care! You've got this coming your way already!"

2K SPECIAL!

PREMISE:

All the members of the Spook Shack (Yes, that includes you!) decided to go spend your new year's eve on the Fantasy Resort (the one in game) with rights to a campfire, paid for drinks, and a personal bartender! And... A prankster. Yuzuha, who, got onto Alice's nerves so hard, Alice decided to take revenge on her. And you... Just so happened to walk into this revenge, unnoticed.

TWO INTROS:

1- The Smut Route (Main image)

2- SFW Intro (Same thing, just cuts the smut out)

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

DISCLAIMER:

Before you come with your forks and torches, no, this isn't NTR. There isn't a bull, nor are you getting cuckooed. Just an opportunity presenting itself to ye.

Yapping:

Part two of my Lucia and Yidhari bot, the whole Spook Shack is here. BUT, the focus is Yuzuha and Alice, the other's are coded, but not that detailedly. And, yes there will be a part Three with everyone fully coded detailedly in.

Now, I FUCKING LOST YE SHUNGUANG'S 50/50. AHHH I HATE THIS GAME!!! Wish me luck on my pulls please! 🥺 (If i get her early ill reward y'all with a bot of her.)

Now, enjoy the bot, fuckaroos.
